subtitle: Critical absences blocking projects; urgent Ivanti incident; Cority engagement at risk
context: Marie Cooksey is absent until Monday 15 June, blocking handover items documented in her 8-12 June note; James Salas Guillen is on annual leave returning Thursday 18 June, leaving DSE user data imports to Cardinus and PeopleXD integration work unattended. Simon Burford's Major Incident meeting regarding the OSM Self-Service security vulnerability with Ivanti requires urgent coordination - Emma Fitz-Gibbon is coordinating support from Asta Palmer and others, but Sarah Warne's next steps communication is pending. Sophie Levy from Cority has not heard from you in two months regarding the Scoping Session update, sent Friday 8 June at 15:58 and still unread. Julie Hickman's email from Sunday 8 June at 13:29 about Access Support Team case 68974493 needs the timeline from AG to proceed with the Chemistry bulk-delete request. The DTP1092 College Data in PXD project has integration questions from Crispin Muncaster (received 17:29 today with attachments) and meeting reschedule requests requiring immediate attention. Open Sophie Levy's Cority email first as it signals a stalled engagement requiring your direct response.
